metadata.title:
SIMPKINS TO BE CHIEF
, WITNESS FOR HAYWOOD

Expected He viii Surrender and Be Used to
Refute Orchards Confession on Which


States Case Rests.

pages.raw_text:
BOISE, Idaho, May 23.-Jack
Simpkins, the missing member of
the quartet of Western Federation
members accused of the murder of
Steunenberg, is expected to sur
render to Idaho authorities in order
that he can be called as chief wit
ness for the defense.


He alone can dispute Orchards
story, as he knew all Orchards
movements.


1t is reported the defense plans
to link great timber frauds with
their case. Detectives have been
working months on the theory that
Steunenberg was murdered by
Orchard at the request of men who
wanted to get him out Of the way,
as he knew too much about their
stealing timber land.


The defense admits it will try to
have Borah's alleged indictment by
the federal grand jury for timber
land frauds injected into the case.
